meta.title: Ai Creative Code Portfolio (Bday: 1989.09.25-)
meta.description: this introduction highlights my experience delivering end-to-end website development while continuously improving usability, accessibility, and overall user experience.

firstSection.title: Supporting User Experience Through Stability and Accessibility
firstSection.text:
Before 2016, I worked as a backend software engineer, where I enjoyed the process of investigating technical issues, identifying root causes, and solving complex problems.
The sense of accomplishment that came from finding effective solutions was one of the most rewarding aspects of my work.

Over time, however, I became increasingly aware that backend development alone could not address usability issues caused by outdated interfaces or design decisions.
Wanting to contribute not only to the technical foundation of a system but also to the overall user experience, I transitioned into web production in 2016.

In web production, I was responsible for the entire implementation process, from hand-coding websites based on Adobe Illustrator designs to integrating them with WordPress and deploying them to production.
After launch, I collaborated closely with directors who had limited technical backgrounds, translating business requests into technical solutions by analyzing each site's structure, identifying root causes, and implementing appropriate improvements.
My responsibilities included UI/UX enhancements, performance optimization, accessibility improvements, WordPress maintenance, and feature enhancements, with a strong focus on continuously improving website quality.

Moving forward, I hope to build on my experience in web development, accessibility, and continuous quality improvement to create web services that are more usable, inclusive, and valuable for everyone, while contributing as an engineer who supports user experience through technology.

data.title: TOEIC 440
data.description:
Taken at a time when my hearing difficulties and developmental disorders were undiagnosed.
Reading comprehension for explicit information, understanding specifications, and fact-based English text processing were stable without accommodations.

data.title: Practical English Proficiency Test (Eiken), Grade 2
data.description:
At that time, I learned at the Kumon Higher Education Division for speed reading.
Due to the drawbacks of language comprehension, I struggled with the listening and interview sections, leading to a decision not to retake the exam.

data.title: Data Science Mathematics Strategist - Intermediate Level

VisualThinking.text:
As part of exploring my personal roots, I have published a research article on the "Community of Mixed-Heritage Orphans in 1970s Nagoya and Its Cultural Evolution", a history my grandparents were closely involved in.

Given the sensitive nature of this topic, I approached the research with strict objectivity, prioritizing diverse viewpoints.
I gathered a wide range of sources, from rare books to international research papers, carefully cross-checking them to ensure historical accuracy.

Through this project, I learned to view individual events not as detached points, but as elements connected to a larger surface, mapping them within a broader social and structural context.
This structural thinking directly translate into my web development work today.
In my daily practice, I rely on official Google documentation and technical community insights to ensure reliable system operation, maintenance, and optimization.

At the same time, I love using creative medium as a language to express my inner state and connect deeply.
On my days off, drawing inspiration from zines and museum visits, I have worked on various projects, including image processing, digital art, video editing, and creative coding.
I am particularly drawn to spirituality and the inner world, continuously researching and reinterpreting.
